name: DoorDash, Inc.

bear: Trend rolling over — spot $160.25 sits -23.9% relative to the 200-DMA ($210.66). The break-down of long-term trend often precedes earnings disappointment by 1–2 quarters as smart-money distribution leads the fundamental print.

Valuation premium — 55.0x forward P/E vs peer median of 26.0x — a 112% premium. The setup requires continued out-execution to maintain; any reversion to peer-median multiples compresses the stock meaningfully even before any earnings revision.
trigger_up: Revenue growth re-accelerates above 24% YoY on next print — confirms the demand environment hasn't degraded into the back half.
Management raises FY guide on next quarterly call — direct upward revision to consensus.
trigger_down: Revenue growth decelerates below 18% YoY — signals demand has materially softened versus the latest disclosed run-rate.
Management cuts FY guide on next quarterly call — direct downward revision; historically sees 5–15% drawdown on print.
Decisive break below the 52-week low at $146.60 — technical confirmation that the long-term trend has rolled over.
